hero.subtitle: Top-rated water damage mitigation and mold remediation services from Santa Clarita to Orange County. We work directly with insurance companies so you don't have to.

about.text:
When you are dealing with catastrophic water damage or severe mold infestations, you need a team that operates with military precision. Major League Restoration was founded on the principles of speed, efficiency, and absolute transparency.

We skip the messy corporate bureaucracy. When you call us, you get a dedicated strike team utilizing commercial-grade extraction systems, advanced thermal imaging, and aggressive structural drying techniques. We document every square inch of the loss, bill your insurance directly, and get your property back to pre-loss conditions faster than anyone else in the industry.

items.name: Water Damage Mitigation
items.description: Rapid extraction, structural drying, and intensive dehumidification to halt secondary damage.

items.name: Mold Remediation
items.description: Safe containment, rigorous HEPA air scrubbing, and total bio-washing clearance.

items.name: Build Back / Reconstruction
items.description: Turnkey solutions from emergency teardown to final paint and finish.

steps.title: Inspection
steps.description: Within hours, our response unit deploys to your property. We perform a complete thermal and moisture mapping sweep to identify all compromised material.

steps.title: Mitigation
steps.description: We establish heavy-duty containment barriers and immediately extract standing water or physically abate hazardous mold to stabilize the environment.

steps.title: Restoration
steps.description: Once perfectly dry and cleared, our build-back division takes over, restoring drywall, flooring, and finishes to better-than-new condition.

insuranceSection.text: Dealing with an insurance adjuster can feel like a part-time job. We handle the entire claim process for you. From submitting the initial moisture mapping reports to negotiating the final build-back estimate, we utilize Xactimate pricing—the exact software your insurance uses—to guarantee your claim is fully covered.

items.title: Emergency Extraction
items.description: Rapid water removal and industrial drying.

items.title: Total Reconstruction
items.description: Restored to better than pre-loss conditions.

items.name: Sarah T., Irvine
items.quote: They arrived within 45 minutes of my frantic call. A pipe burst in the kitchen and flooded into the living room, but their crew extracted the water and set up drying equipment so fast that our hardwood floors were saved. Highly recommend their professionalism.

items.name: Mark D., Santa Clarita
items.quote: Dealt with a difficult mold issue in our attic that another company failed to fully clear. Major League Response handled the abatement clean and quick, and their communication throughout the insurance process was phenomenal.

items.name: Jessica L., Orange County
items.quote: After a small kitchen fire, the smoke damage was overwhelming. The team cleaned, deodorized, and completely rebuilt the damaged cabinets. It looks better now than it did before the incident.

items.question: How quickly can you arrive?
items.answer: For emergency board-ups or active water intrusions, our dispatch team can usually deploy a mitigation squad to any property in Los Angeles County, Orange County, or the Santa Clarita Valley within 60 to 90 minutes.

items.question: Will my insurance cover mold remediation?
items.answer: It depends entirely on your specific policy limits and the cause of the mold. Sudden pipe bursts that result in mold are typically covered, whereas long-term neglect is often denied. Our inspectors will help you decipher your policy before we begin work.

items.question: Do I have to pay out of pocket before work starts?
items.answer: Unless you are paying out-of-pocket as a cash client, we typically bill your insurance carrier directly for the mitigation and drying phases. You will only be responsible for your standard insurance deductible.

footerSection.description: Premium water mitigation and mold remediation services. We play in the Major Leagues so you don't have to worry.
